title: 3 Facts About Your Body

segments.text: Your body makes around twenty five million new cells every single second.
It is basically rebuilding you all the time.
The blood vessels in your body could wrap around the Earth more than twice.
Your stomach acid is strong enough to dissolve some metals.
And you produce enough saliva in your life to fill two swimming pools.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your body builds 25 million cells every second. You are wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
